sections.title: Fee Resolution

checks.text: `fee_mode: auto` resolves correctly from exchange API
Fee rates match exchange dashboard (maker/taker)
`require_fee_resolution: true` blocks trading when fees fail

sections.evidence_text: `processed_data.fee_source` shows `api:exchange:*`

sections.title: Trading Rules

checks.text: Min notional, tick size, lot size match exchange docs
`_quantize_price` and `_quantize_amount` produce valid values
Orders pass exchange validation (no rejects for size/price)

sections.evidence_text: Zero `did_fail_order` events with "invalid" in message

sections.title: Kill Switch

checks.text: `services/kill_switch/main.py` deployed and running
Dry-run kill switch tested: cancels all orders
Live kill switch tested on testnet: orders actually canceled

sections.evidence_text: `reports/kill_switch/latest.json` shows `status: executed`

sections.title: Orphan Order Scan

checks.text: Startup scan detects and cancels untracked orders
Tested: place order via exchange UI, restart bot, verify canceled

sections.evidence_text: Log entry "Orphan order canceled: ..."

sections.title: Position Reconciliation

checks.text: `_check_position_reconciliation` runs every 5 min
Position drift > 5% triggers SOFT_PAUSE
`position_drift_pct` visible in `processed_data`

sections.evidence_text: `position_drift_pct` stays < 1% during normal operation

sections.title: WS Reconnection

checks.text: `ws_reconnect_count` tracked in `processed_data`
Order book staleness detected (same TOB > 30s)
`connector_status` dict visible in `processed_data`

sections.evidence_text: Zero undetected WS drops during 24h soak

sections.title: Order Lifecycle

checks.text: Order ack timeout (30s) triggers cancel for stuck orders
Cancel-before-place guard prevents duplicate levels
`max_active_executors` limit enforced
Execution price deviation > 1% logged as WARNING

sections.evidence_text: No duplicate orders during regime transitions

sections.title: Rate Limits

checks.text: `cancel_budget_per_min: 50` aligns with exchange limit
Cancel budget escalation (3 breaches → HARD_STOP) works
Exchange rate limit headers show > 50% headroom during soak

sections.evidence_text: Zero 429 responses during 48h soak

sections.title: Risk Controls

checks.text: `max_daily_loss_pct_hard: 0.03` triggers HARD_STOP
`max_drawdown_pct_hard: 0.05` triggers HARD_STOP
HARD_STOP publishes kill_switch intent
Leverage cap validated (`max_leverage` check in __init__)
Margin ratio monitoring active (perps)

sections.evidence_text: Synthetic breach test triggers expected controls

sections.title: PnL Accounting

checks.text: `realized_pnl_quote` column in fills.csv is populated
Daily state persists across restart (`daily_state.json`)
Funding rate tracked and visible in `processed_data`
`edge_report.py` shows positive or explainable negative edge

sections.evidence_text: Daily PnL matches exchange account statement within 5%

sections.title: Paper→Live Parity

checks.text: Run paper and testnet simultaneously for 1 hour
Compare: fill count ratio, spread capture, regime distribution
PnL direction should be consistent (both positive or both negative)

sections.evidence_text: Side-by-side comparison document

sections.title: Restart Recovery

checks.text: Start bot, let it place orders, SIGKILL process
Restart and verify orphan orders detected/canceled
Daily state restored (loss limits carry over)

sections.evidence_text: Log entries showing orphan cleanup + state restoration

sections.title: Multi-Day Soak (48h)

checks.text: Run continuously on testnet for 48 hours
Daily rollover resets counters correctly
No memory growth (check RSS every 6h)
No executor leak (active count stays bounded)
Funding rate settlement handled (every 8h)

sections.evidence_text: `minute.csv` shows 2880 rows, no gaps

sections.title: Exchange-Specific

checks.text: Bitget API key has trade + read permissions only (no withdrawal)
IP allowlist configured on exchange
Account is in correct mode (isolated/cross margin)
Position mode (ONEWAY) confirmed on exchange

sections.evidence_text: Exchange account settings screenshot

sections.title: Framework Patch Audit

checks.text: `enable_framework_paper_compat_fallbacks()` patches disabled in live mode
Live connector uses unpatched framework paths (no paper compat shims)

sections.evidence_text: Code path audit; live mode does not call `enable_framework_paper_compat_fallbacks()` or patches are gated by `BOT_MODE=paper`

sections.title: Connector Health

checks.text: `connector.ready` returns real health state (not hardcoded `True`)
WS/API connectivity failures reflected in `ready` status

sections.evidence_text: Disconnect test shows `ready=False`; `processed_data.connector_status` reflects actual state

sections.title: NTP/Clock Drift

checks.text: Host clock drift < 2s vs exchange server time
NTP sync verified on deployment host

sections.evidence_text: `ntpdate -q pool.ntp.org` or equivalent; exchange timestamp comparison

sections.title: Kill Switch Post-Cancel

checks.text: Kill switch stops bot container after cancel-all
`KILL_SWITCH_STOP_BOT=true` and `KILL_SWITCH_BOT_CONTAINER` correctly set

sections.evidence_text: Kill switch dry-run then live test; bot container stopped after cancel

sections.title: Startup Sync Failure

checks.text: Startup sync failure → HARD_STOP (verified)
Position/order sync failure on init blocks trading

sections.evidence_text: Synthetic sync failure test triggers HARD_STOP; no orders placed

sections.title: Exchange Snapshot Perp Positions

checks.text: Exchange snapshot fetches perp positions
`FETCH_PERP_POSITIONS=true` (default); `reports/exchange_snapshots/latest.json` includes `positions`

sections.evidence_text: Snapshot JSON contains non-empty `positions` array when perp positions exist

sections.title: Rapid Partial Fill Stress Test

checks.text: Rapid partial fill stress test: 50+ fills/order on testnet
No executor leak, no memory growth, correct PnL accounting

sections.evidence_text: Testnet run with high churn; executor count bounded; fills.csv accurate

sections.title: Network Partition Test

checks.text: Network partition test: 30s disconnect mid-trading
WS reconnect handled; no orphan orders; safe recovery

sections.evidence_text: `iptables` or similar disconnect; log shows reconnect; no duplicate orders

sections.title: Redis Outage Test

checks.text: Redis outage test: 5 min stop, verify safe operation
Bot degrades gracefully (SOFT_PAUSE or equivalent); no crash

sections.evidence_text: `docker stop hbot-redis` for 5 min; bot behavior logged; recovery on Redis restart

sections.title: did_fail_order Streak Fix

checks.text: `did_fail_order` streak fix verified: cancel streak not reset on unrelated failures
Order rejections do not incorrectly reset cancel-budget or executor state

sections.evidence_text: Synthetic `did_fail_order` test; cancel streak preserved per EXEC-E6
